items.name_cn:
Mint Green
GABY MINI Box Bag
The adorable new arrival for the upcoming spring and summer season~ Roseanne Park's matching makeup bag/box bag, featuring lambskin + unique stitching craftsmanship, double zipper design for easy opening, small body with large capacity, detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand or crossbody, also serves as a makeup bag, exquisite and practical, the latest bestseller, well-deserved.
Style: 766731
Size: 18x11x6.5cm

items.name_cn:
Mint Green Hand-Rubbed Leather·
Accordion Bag 32cm
The most elegant Sac de jour series, a timeless classic. Exquisite hand-rubbed calfskin with clear texture and a rich luster, very luxurious! Comes with a middle divider inside, can be removed to use as a clutch; the shoulder strap is adjustable for your preferred length. The logo is very small, perfectly embodying the style of understated luxury~
Model: 378299
Dimensions: 32×25.5×15.5cm
(32cm comes with a middle divider)

items.name_cn:
Miu Miu Reproduction
New best-selling vintage tote bag, made with new soft lambskin leather. The leather is soft and premium. This Aventure Nappa leather bag is inspired by Miu Miu's classic designs. The structure has been adjusted to be lighter and exudes a new personality. It features a embossed letter logo, adding a signature element. Vintage gold hardware, linen blend lining, with a zip pocket and patch pocket. Long handle suitable for hand or shoulder carry. Dimensions: 31x40x13cm, comes with original packaging 5BG291

specs.rawTitle:
Miu Miu Reproduction
New best-selling vintage tote bag, made with new soft lambskin leather. The leather is soft and premium. This Aventure Nappa leather bag is inspired by Miu Miu's classic designs. The structure has been adjusted to be lighter and exudes a new personality. It features a embossed letter logo, adding a signature element. Vintage gold hardware, linen blend lining, with a zip pocket and patch pocket. Long handle suitable for hand or shoulder carry. Dimensions: 31x40x13cm, comes with original packaging 5BG291

items.name_cn: Miu Miu /women's bag
Miu Miu /women's bag

MIUMIU Arcadie Matelassé
Sheepskin Bowling Bag Small Tote
Snow Pink
When snow pink meets classic Matelassé quilting, this bag becomes a gentle highlight for your autumn and winter wardrobe.
Like the clear pink haze of snow kissing cherry blossoms, it glows with a soft, hazy light. This sophisticated tone brightens the complexion, injecting a lingering warmth into the chilly season.
✅Fits iPhone 13 Pro
▫️Matelasse pattern
▫️Leather handle
▫️Detachable and adjustable 105cm leather shoulder strap
▫️Detachable leather mirror case
▫️Gold-tone hardware
▫️Front lacquered metal letter logo
▫️Zipper top with 2 lined pockets
▫️With studs
🔍Size:19*13*6cm
📌Model:5BB123M1200
